summary.finance: KOSPI continues to trade lower, down ~3.6% at 5,281.6, driven by geopolitical tensions and concerns over Iran-US relations.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 in full swing at BEXCO; strong interest reported despite broader market volatility.

market_highlights: KOSPI index remains under pressure, hovering around 5,281.6 (down 3.6%).
Sell-off triggered by Trump's stern warning regarding Iran tensions.
Samsung Electronics (-5.17%) and SK Hynix (-5.15%) showing significant declines.
Foreign and institutional investors remain net sellers in the afternoon session.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 (Busan Annual Market of Art) continues its first day at BEXCO.
Despite market uncertainty, fair attendance is reported to be steady.
Collectors showing interest in 'NODE' theme sections.
